queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how the magnitude of requested credit amounts influences default probability and serves as a primary determinant of default.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Investigation into how the absence of a checking account contributes to elevated default probability and functions as a significant credit risk driver.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical examination of the relationship between minimal savings balances and reduced default probability, assessing their role as a mitigating factor among credit risk drivers.
